source: {"Iai", 25, "Gives a single accuracy-boosted retaliatory blow against melee attacks, at the cost of increasing all damage taken by 20%. Any melee attack by you dispels this posture."},
zh_cn: {"居合", 25, "在受到近战攻击时，提供一次命中率加成的单次反击，代价是受到的所有伤害增加20%。你的任何近战攻击都会解除该架势。"},

source: {"Huujin", 30, "Gives reflection unless blind, at the cost of -1.00 to blows."},
zh_cn: {"风神", 30, "除非处于盲目状态，否则提供反射能力，代价是每回合攻击次数 -1.00。"},

source: {"Kouki", 35, "Gives +5 to all stats and +50 melee to-hit, at the cost of -50 AC, vulnerability to the base elements, and zero regeneration. Using most inventory items dispels this posture."},
zh_cn: {"光气", 35, "所有属性 +5，且近战命中 +50，代价是 -50 护甲等级(AC)，对基础元素变得脆弱，并且生命回复降为零。使用大多数物品栏物品都会解除该架势。"},

source: {"Musou", 40, "Gives full telepathy and ultimate resistance, halves most types of damage, and gives a full round of retaliatory blows against melee attacks, at the cost of 2 SP per turn. Almost any action other than retaliation dispels this posture."},
zh_cn: {"无双", 40, "提供完全的心灵感应和终极抗性，使大多数类型的伤害减半，并在受到近战攻击时提供一整轮的反击，代价是每回合消耗 2 点法力(SP)。除了反击之外的几乎任何动作都会解除该架势。"},
